_comment: Shared test vectors for Ignition Flint encoding. Consumed by both Lua and Python test suites. If either diverges, CI fails.

round_trip.name: simple_script
round_trip.text:
print("Hello")
x = 5
if x < 10:
	return True

round_trip.name: complex_script
all_unicode_chars
round_trip.text: if x < 10 & x > 0 & x = 5 & name = 'test': html = 'bold'

round_trip.name: realistic_ignition_script
round_trip.text:
# Tag change handler
logger = system.util.getLogger("TagChange")
old = previousValue.value
new = currentValue.value

if new > old & new > 100:
    logger.warn("Threshold exceeded: " + str(new))
    system.tag.writeBlocking(
        ["[default]Alarms/HighValue"],
        [True]
    )

# Update the display
system.perspective.sendMessage(
    "valueUpdate",
    {"tag": tagPath, "value": new},
    scope="page"
)

decode_edge_cases.name: double_backslash_then_t
decode_edge_cases._comment: \\t is escaped-backslash + literal t, NOT a tab

decode_edge_cases.name: double_backslash_then_n
decode_edge_cases._comment: \\n is escaped-backslash + literal n, NOT a newline

decode_edge_cases.name: unknown_unicode
decode_edge_cases._comment: Unknown unicode escapes are kept as-is

decode_edge_cases.name: truncated_unicode
decode_edge_cases._comment: Truncated unicode escape at end of string

decode_edge_cases.name: backslash_at_end
decode_edge_cases._comment: Trailing backslash with nothing after it
